title: delissea calycina
intro: Delissea calycina, also known as Hawaiian holly fern or Hawaiian holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Delissea calycina include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Delissea calycina is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal preparations.
